Samuel Rodriguez
Charlotte, NC

Summary
Dedicated and physically fit dock worker with over 1 year of experience in freight handling and warehouse operations. Proven ability to operate forklifts safely and efficiently, with a strong track record of meeting tight deadlines in fast-paced environments. Seeking to leverage my skills in a new dock worker position to contribute to an efficient and organized operation.

Experience

Dock Worker  
Freight Solutions Inc., Charlotte, NC  
March 2022 - Present  
- Operated forklifts to transport freight and materials within the warehouse, ensuring safe and timely deliveries.  
- Assisted in loading and unloading trucks, consistently lifting up to 75 lbs to ensure efficient workflow.  
- Collaborated with team members to maintain organization and cleanliness of the dock area, adhering to safety protocols.

Warehouse Associate  
QuickShip Logistics, Gastonia, NC  
January 2021 - February 2022  
- Supported daily warehouse operations by managing inventory and restocking shelves.  
- Engaged in physical labor, including lifting heavy boxes and operating manual pallet jacks.  
- Assisted in training new employees on safety procedures and equipment operation.

Certifications
- Forklift Operator Certification, OSHA-compliant, April 2021

Skills
- Forklift operation  
- Freight handling  
- Team collaboration  
- Safety compliance  
- Inventory management  

Education
High School Diploma  
Charlotte High School, Charlotte, NC
